description: Log in to Splunk at http://localhost:8000 (username: 'admin', password: 'SplunkAdmin1!'). In the Search & Reporting app, create a scheduled alert named 'High_Error_Rate_Alert' that triggers when the percentage of HTTP 5xx errors in the 'tutorial' index exceeds 5% of total traffic. The alert must run every 5 minutes (cron: */5 * * * *) and trigger when the number of results is greater than 0. Additionally, create a dashboard named 'Service_Level_Indicators' in the Search & Reporting app containing at least two panels that analyze web errors from the 'tutorial' index, such as a timechart of error rates and a table of top error URIs.
